allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add jj \(Jujutsu\) support to Nix module and fix aarch64 install

- Add jujutsu package to ralph.nix using overlay from nixpkgs-unstable
  \(24.11 version is marked insecure due to GHSA-794x-2rpg-rfgr\)
- Fix setup-base-vm.sh to detect architecture and download correct binary
  for both x86_64 and aarch64
- Clean up redundant comments in flake.nix

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
